# CSE140-HW3 Test Cases (Two’s Complement Immediate)


## R-type

### add

```
00000000001100100000001010110011
add x5,x4,x3
```

```
00000000101101010000010100110011
add x10,x10,x11
```

### sub

```
01000000000101001000010000110011
sub x8,x9,x1
```

### and

```
00000001111100010111000010110011
and x1,x2,x31
```

### or

```
00000000010100110110001110110011
or x7,x6,x5
```

### xor

```
00000000110101110100011110110011
xor x15,x14,x13
```

### sll

```
00000000001100010001000010110011
sll x1,x2,x3
```

### slt

```
00000000110101100010010110110011
slt x11,x12,x13
```

### sltu

```
00000000101101010011010010110011
sltu x9,x10,x11
```

### srl

```
00000000011000101101001000110011
srl x4,x5,x6
```

### sra

```
01000000100101000101001110110011
sra x7,x8,x9
```

## I-type（负 immediate）

### addi

```
11111111111100000000000010010011
addi x1,x0,-1
```

```
11111111111000000000000100010011
addi x2,x0,-2
```

```
11111111110000101000001010010011
addi x5,x5,-4
```

```
11111111000000000000000110010011
addi x3,x0,-16
```

---

### andi

```
11111111111100110111001010010011
andi x5,x6,-1
```

```
11111111000011111111111110010011
andi x31,x31,-16
```

---

### ori

```
11111111111100100110000110010011
ori x3,x4,-1
```

```
11111110000001000110010000010011
ori x8,x8,-32
```

---

### xori

```
11111111111000001100000100010011
xori x2,x1,-2
```

```
11111111000001001100010010010011
xori x9,x9,-16
```

---

## Load（负 offset）

### lb

```
11111111100000010000000010000011
lb x1,-8(x2)
```

### lh

```
11111111110000101001001010000011
lh x5,-4(x5)
```

### lw

```
11111111110000000010111110000011
lw x31,-4(x0)
```

```
11111111000001001010010100000011
lw x10,-16(x9)
```

---

## Store（S-type补码）

### sb

```
11111110001100100000100000100011
sb x3,-16(x4)
```

### sh

```
11111110000100010001111100100011
sh x1,-2(x2)
```

### sw

```
11111110001100101010110000100011
sw x3,-8(x5)
```

```
11111110010001001010111000100011
sw x4,-4(x9)
```

---

## Branch（SB-type补码）

> Branch immediate 比较容易错，因为 bit 被拆开编码。

### beq

```
11111110000000000000111011100011
beq x0,x0,-4
```

```
11111110101001010000110011100011
beq x10,x10,-8
```

### bne

```
11111110101101010001110011100011
bne x10,x11,-8
```

```
11111110000100010001101011100011
bne x2,x1,-12
```

### blt

```
11111110110001100100100011100011
blt x12,x12,-16
```

### bge

```
11111110010000011101111111100011
bge x3,x4,-2
```

---

## Jumps（大负数）

### jal

```
10000000000111111111000001101111
jal x0,-2048
```

```
11111111100111111111000011101111
jal x1,-8
```
